title: Method: list_actions
description: Returns the catalog of actions the daemon can bind to inputs, including the param shape each action needs so a client can render a config form. No params in v1.

actions.description: All actions available to bind. Built-ins plus any registered plugin actions.

ActionDescriptor.title: ActionDescriptor
ActionDescriptor.description: Describes a bindable action type and the params it accepts.

type.description: Action type, as used in Action.type (e.g. 'launch_app').

name.description: Human-friendly action name for the UI.

description.description: Optional longer description of what the action does.

params.description: Params this action accepts, in display order.

ParamSpec.title: ParamSpec
ParamSpec.description: Describes one action parameter so a client can render an input for it.

type.description: Param value type. Only 'string' in v1.

placeholder.description: Optional placeholder/example shown in the input.
